subcodes.first_line: O Most Great Branch! By My life! Thy tribulations have grieved Me, but God shall heal thee and preserve thee, for He is the Best, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]... ...The glory of God rest upon Thee and upon whosoever serveth Thee and circleth around Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غصن اعظم لعمر الله نوازلک کدرتنی ولکن الله یشفیک و یحفظک و هو خیر کریم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
